subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Zaynu'l-Muqarrabin 2
subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon My countenance and hast quaffed the chalice of My loving-kindness and the cup of My mercy and bounty, and who dwellest in [3.5s]... ...Call thou to mind that which hath been revealed unto Mihdí, Our servant, in the first year of Our banishment to the Land of Mystery (Adrianople)
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی وجهی و الشارب کاس عنایتی و کوب رحمتی و افضالی و الساکن فی
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
